headline: Truist Lifts PT on Travel + Leisure Co. (TNL) to $88 From $71 – Here’s Why
summary: Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL) is one of the most undervalued hotel stocks to invest in now. Truist lifted the price target on Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL) to $88 from $71 on March 3, maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. The rating update came as part of a broader research note on the […]

headline: A Look At Truist Financial (TFC) Valuation After New Plaid Open Banking Partnership
summary: Truist Financial (TFC) is back in focus after agreeing to a data access partnership with Plaid that expands secure open banking for clients, with new features aimed at control, security, and data quality. See our latest analysis for Truist Financial. Despite the Plaid agreement and recent leadership moves in its payments business, Truist Financial's share price has been under pressure, with a 30 day share price return of 15.55% decline and a year to date share price return of 11.88% decline...
